SEARCH
Package co.edu.unbosque.venta.service

Class VentaService

java.lang.Object
co.edu.unbosque.venta.service.VentaService
All Implemented Interfaces:
CRUDOperations<Venta>
@Service @Transactional public class VentaService extends Object implements CRUDOperations<Venta>
Service class responsible for managing sales operations. It implements CRUD operations for the Venta entity and handles business logic such as calculating totals, retrieving product and client information, generating invoices and reports.
Author:
Wilmer Ramos

  • Method Details

    • crear

      public int crear(Venta o)
      Creates a new sale and calculates all financial values such as subtotal, VAT (IVA), and total.
      Specified by:
      crear in interface CRUDOperations<Venta>
      Parameters:
      o - Venta object containing the sale information
      Returns:
      0 if the sale is successfully created

    • eliminar

      public int eliminar(Long in)
      Deletes a sale by its ID.
      Specified by:
      eliminar in interface CRUDOperations<Venta>
      Parameters:
      in - ID of the sale to delete
      Returns:
      0 if deletion was successful, 1 if the sale does not exist

    • mostrarTodo

      public List<Venta> mostrarTodo()
      Retrieves all sales stored in the database.
      Specified by:
      mostrarTodo in interface CRUDOperations<Venta>
      Returns:
      list of Venta objects

    • actualizar

      public int actualizar(Long id, Venta nuevaData)
      Updates an existing sale and its detail list.
      Specified by:
      actualizar in interface CRUDOperations<Venta>
      Parameters:
      id - ID of the sale to update
      nuevaData - new sale data
      Returns:
      0 if update was successful, 2 if the sale does not exist

    • buscarPorId

      public Optional<Venta> buscarPorId(Long id)
      Finds a sale by its ID.
      Specified by:
      buscarPorId in interface CRUDOperations<Venta>
      Parameters:
      id - ID of the sale
      Returns:
      Optional containing the sale if found

    • obtenerClientePorCedula

      public ClienteDTO obtenerClientePorCedula(Long cedula)
      Retrieves client information from the Cliente microservice.
      Parameters:
      cedula - client identification number
      Returns:
      ClienteDTO containing client information

    • obtenerProductoPorCodigo

      public ProductoDTO obtenerProductoPorCodigo(Long codigo)
      Retrieves product information from the Producto microservice.
      Parameters:
      codigo - product code
      Returns:
      ProductoDTO containing product information

    • generarReporteVentasPorCliente

      public List<Map<String,Object>> generarReporteVentasPorCliente()
      Generates a sales report grouped by client.
      Returns:
      list containing client sales summary

    • findTitleAlreadyTaken

      public boolean findTitleAlreadyTaken(Venta newVenta)
      Checks if a sale code already exists in the database.
      Parameters:
      newVenta - sale to verify
      Returns:
      true if the sale code already exists

    • obtenerFactura

      public FacturaDTO obtenerFactura(Long codigoVenta)
      Generates a complete invoice using the sale information, client data, and product details.
      Parameters:
      codigoVenta - sale code used to retrieve the invoice
      Returns:
      FacturaDTO containing the invoice information
